summary: Phase 0 auth foundation fully verified. All 22 pytest cases pass (health, openapi, OTP send/verify, JWT flow, duplicate phone, invalid OTP + attempts lockout, OTP hash+TTL, rate limit 3/10min, refresh rotation + reuse detection + family burn, logout, role add/switch/reject-admin, patch profile + invalid current_role, Mongo indexes). SEC-001 dev_otp gating + fail-closed manually verified (503 with OTP_DEV_MODE=false, MSG91 blank, no dev_otp leaked; restored to true). SEC-002 .gitignore verified via `git check-ignore backend/.env`. SEC-003 refresh rotation + reuse + family burn verified. Admin seeded correctly (phone 9999999999, roles [admin,customer]). Frontend E2E on mobile viewport (420x900) passes: Landing → /login → phone → /verify-otp with DEV MODE banner + auto-filled OTP → /onboarding → name + vendor role → /dashboard with role chips → /profile → add creator → switch role → save profile → logout. Existing user login skips onboarding, goes straight to /dashboard.

issues: Toast notifications (top-center, sonner) can visually overlap the profile-link avatar in top-right when multiple toasts stack. Not blocking but caused a transient click-timing issue in automated test (workaround: wait ~2s after login). Consider dismissing prior toasts on route change or moving avatar below toast stack.

critical_code_review_comments: Rate limiter (utils/rate_limit.py) is in-memory only — will not survive worker restarts or multi-instance deployments. Fine for Phase 0 dev; flag for Phase 1 (move to Redis).

Profile.jsx logout navigates to '/' but browser landed on /login — likely because Landing auto-redirects or because the RequireAuth wrapper unmounts and triggers a redirect. Minor UX inconsistency; user is correctly logged out either way.

user_service.switch_role allows 'admin' string to pass initial validation (only rejects unknown roles) and relies on the user.roles membership check — safe today because admin can only reach roles via seed, but consider explicit deny to align with add_role's strict allowlist.

auth_routes.py Role Literal in OtpVerifyBody excludes admin (good); but ProfileUpdateBody & RoleBody in user_routes.py include 'admin' in the Literal. Service correctly rejects for add-role, but tightening the Literal on add-role's body would give a cleaner 422 vs 400.
updated_files: /app/backend/.env (temporarily flipped OTP_DEV_MODE for fail-closed verification, then restored to true)
test_credentials: Phone 9876500123 (fresh), 9999999999 (admin seed). OTP fetched from /api/v1/auth/otp/send dev_otp field.
seed_data_creation: Admin (phone 9999999999) is seeded by backend startup. Test data cleaned up post-run.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Baseline is green. Backend URL: REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL from frontend/.env (https://emergent-india-2.preview.emergentagent.com). Use pytest /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py for regression. Frontend viewport for mobile testing: 420x900. Wait ~2s after login-toast before clicking profile avatar to avoid transient overlay.
